title: Business & Self-Employment
description: This category explains the basics of starting and managing a one-person business (JDG) in Poland, including B2B work, CEIDG registration, ZUS contributions, health insurance as self-employed, taxes and VAT, and suspending or closing a business. It also gives a lighter overview of other business forms, like spółka z o.o., so you understand that not every business in Poland goes through CEIDG.
owns: health insurance as a self-employed person
suspending, resuming, or closing business activity
doesNotOwn: tax advice or choosing a taxation form for your specific situation
company law for spółka z o.o. and other legal forms (only a light overview)
residence permits based on running a business
legal or financial advice about your specific business
